console.postUpdateCardImageError: Discussion Cards> Error while refreshing updated card image for this discussion:

statsToolsBanner.refreshStats: Image statistics have been updated successfully
statsToolsBanner.purgeImagesModal_helpText: These options will let you delete discussion card images from your server. You can find more purge options with the CLI command: php flarum discussion-cards:purge-images --help WARNING: these actions are irreversible! Also, note that default images (general or tag) will not be delete here (to delete them, use the remove button in the dedicated section of the extension settings or tag settings respectively
statsToolsBanner.purgeImagesModal_deleteUnusedHelp: This will delete all unused images from your disk (server). These images are no longer in use by any discussion card and are therefore safe to delete. Clicking the following button will run this CLI command: php flarum discussion-cards:purge-images
statsToolsBanner.purgeImagesModal_deleteAllHelp: This will delete all discussion card images from your disk (server). Clicking the following button will run this CLI command: php flarum discussion-cards:purge-images --all
statsToolsBanner.purgeImagesModal_error: An error occurred while purging images.
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_helpText: These options will let you regenerate your discussion card images. To regenerate a different number of discussion cards images or ALL of them, use the dedicated CLI command; you can find more details about it by
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateLatestLa: Regenerate card images for the 20 latest discussions
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateLatestHe: This will resolve and regenerate card images for the 20 latest discussions. Clicking the following button will run this CLI command: php flarum discussion-cards:regenerate-images.
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateLTNOLabe: Regenerate card images for the 20 latest, top, newest & oldest discussions
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateLTNOHelp: This will resolve and regenerate card images for the 20 latest, top, newest and oldest discussions. Discussions belonging to multiple categories will be processed once. Clicking the following button will run this CLI command: php flarum discussion-cards:regenerate-images -l -t -N -o.
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateLTNOBtnT: Regenerate 20 latest, top, newest & oldest card images
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateWithoutL: Generate card images for discussions without any
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_regenerateWithoutH: This will resolve and generate card images for discussions that don't have any card image set (showing the stub image instead of one of the default images or one from its first post). This will only process a maximum of 20 discussions without images per execution. Clicking the following button will run this CLI command: php flarum discussion-cards:regenerate-images -a -w 20.
statsToolsBanner.regenerateImagesModal_error: An error occurred while regenerating images.
statsToolsBanner.debugModal_discussionDebugHelpText: Use this to check how and why a card image is selected for a specific discussion. Enter that discussion's ID number and click on the check discussion button.
statsToolsBanner.debugModal_discussionDebugCheckingMessag: Analyzing card image resolution data for discussion #{discussionId}... (waiting for results)

general.where_info: Set where you want to use discussion cards.
general.allowedTags_help: Discussion cards will be activated and shown for the selected tags pages.
general.onIndexPage_label: Activate cards on the Index Page
general.onIndexPage_help: If activated, the all discussions page will show cards.
general.primaryCardOptions_info: Set the options for primary cards (bigger cards at the top of each page using discussion cards).
general.primaryCards_help: Number of bigger cards shown at the top of each page using discussion cards. Positive number (0 for none).
general.desktopCardWidth_help: Set the width (in %) of the primary cards on desktop. (between 10 and 100)
general.tabletCardWidth_help: Set the width (in %) of the primary cards on tablets. (between 10 and 100)
general.listCardOptions_info: Set the options for discussion lists cards (smaller than primary cards).
general.listCards_help: Display discussion list items as cards (smaller than primary cards). If not activated, default flarum discussion list items will be shown (no cards)
general.listCardsCount_help: Number of discussion list items to be shown as smaller cards when Use cards for discussion lists is activated (0 for all, max: 20)
general.cardOptions_info: Set what data/infos should be shown on the cards.
general.defaultImage_info: Here you can change the default image to be used on cards when none is found in the discussion's first message. IMPORTANT: note that changing the image will discard any other unsaved settings changes you made and will reload the page automatically. Please save your changes before changing the image (or vice versa 😉). Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP or WebP files. Ideal resolution: 400px x 225px (all uploaded images will be converted to a WebP file and resized to a width of 400px, except for images with smaller width, which will keep their initial resolution, and won't be upscaled). Depending on your file's resolution, the image could be shown cropped and/or stretched on cards.
general.previewText_help: If activated, shows the start of the first message as a preview on the card.
general.showAuthor_help: If activated, shows the author of the discussion on the cards.
general.showReplies_help: If activated, shows the number of replies or unread replies (if any) on the cards (and the avatars of a some participants in the discussion on primary cards).
general.showRepliesOnRight_label: Show the number of replies/unread replies on the right side of the card's title
general.showRepliesOnRight_help: If option is enabled, it places the number of replies or unread replies (if any) on the right side of the (non primary) cards' title on large screens (instead of the default bottom-left side of the image).
general.showLastPostInfo_help: If option is enabled, it will display the username of the last poster of the discussion and its date at the bottom of the cards.
general.showBadges_help: If activated, shows badges at the top left corner of the cards.
general.markReadCards_help: If activated, read discussions will have a lighter title and text.
general.otherOptions_info: The following options will require other extensions to be installed and activated for them to work. IMPORTANT: please read all the info for each individual option and do the required steps before activating them.
general.showViews_title_end: extension installed and activated, you can set the following (1) option:
general.viewsExtension_notInstalled: {icon} One of these extensions needs to be installed & activated for this setting to work.
general.viewsExtension_notActivated: {icon} The Discussion Views extension needs to be activated for this setting to work.
general.showViews_help: If option is enabled, shows the number of views on the cards.
general.blogExtension_title_end: extension installed and activated, you can set the following (2) options:
general.blogExtension_notInstalled: {icon} This extension needs to be installed & activated for these settings to work.
general.blogExtension_notActivated: {icon} This extension needs to be activated for these settings to work.
general.useBlogImages_label: Use the blog's default and featured images
general.useBlogImages_help: If option is enabled, the cards' image for every blog post will set to: the blog post's featured image; if none, to the blog's content's first found image; if none, to the blog extension's default image; if none, to the discussion cards' tag default image; if none, to the discussion cards' main default image. Note that custom settings for tags used as blog tags will of course be ignored if you chose to redirect blog tags in the Flarum Blog extension settings.
general.useBlogSummary_label: Use blog post's summary as preview text
general.useBlogSummary_help: If this option and preview text are enabled, the cards for blog posts will show the start of the blog post's summary as preview text instead of the start of the blog post's text.
general.repostExtension_title_end: extension installed and activated, you can set the following (1) option:
general.repostExtension_notInstalled: {icon} This extension needs to be installed & activated for this setting to work.
general.repostExtension_notActivated: {icon} This extension needs to be activated for this setting to work.
general.allowRepostLinks_label: Allow Repost links behavior on cards
general.allowRepostLinks_help: If this option is enabled (along with the Repost extension), cards for discussions that starts with a url, will open the url when the title of the card is clicked on, whereas the discussion will open, as usual, if any other part of the card is clicked on.

tags.defaultImage_info: Set or change the default card image for this tag's page. See the Discussion Cards general settings for details on accepted file formats & resolutions.

tag_modal.title: Discussion Card Settings for
tag_modal.intro_text: Here you can set different discussion cards settings for the current tag's page.
tag_modal.primaryCards_help: Number of bigger cards shown at the top of the page (global setting : {default}, min: 0).
tag_modal.desktopCardWidth_help: Set the width (in %) of the primary cards on desktop (global setting: {default}%, min: 10% & max: 100%).
tag_modal.tabletCardWidth_help: Set the width (in %) of the primary cards on tablets (global setting: {default}%, min: 10% & max: 100%).
tag_modal.useListCards_help: Display discussion list items as cards (smaller than primary cards). If not activated, default flarum discussion list items will be shown (no cards)
tag_modal.listCardsCount_help: Number of discussion list items to be shown as smaller cards when Use cards for discussion lists is activated (0 for all, max: 20)

errors.primaryCards: Number of primary cards must be a positive number (0 or greater)
errors.desktopCardWidth: Primary cards width on desktop must be a number between 10 and 100
errors.tabletCardWidth: Primary cards width on tablets must be a number between 10 and 100
errors.listCardsCount: Value of Number of list cards must be between 0 and 20 (0 for all)
errors.fileSize: File size must be under 2 Mb
errors.invalidMime: File format not supported. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP or WebP
errors.imageProcessingSourceNotFound: Image processing: source image {path} not found!
errors.deleteTargetNotFound: Nothing to delete: target file {file} not found!
errors.filenameTagidMissing: Couldn't generate filename: Tag ID missing!
errors.filenameInvalidOrigin: Couldn't generate filename: unable to determine context {origin}!
errors.adminImageNoPath: The service hasn't provided a filename.
errors.debugModalDiscussionId: Discussion ID number must be a positive number (1 or greater)

console.purgeImagesDryRun: Simulation mode (dry run) activated: nothing will be deleted.
console.purgeImagesSummary: ➡ Purge summary: {deleted} deleted, {skipped} skipped & {updated} updated discussion(s)
console.purgeImagesEnd: Purging discussion cards images is completed.
console.purgeImagesInvalidArguments: Invalid arguments (run with --help flag for details on how to use).
console.regenerateImagesConfirmAll: ⚠️ Do you really want to regenerate card images for ALL discussions? This might take a while and use a lot of ressources (Y/N)
console.regenerateImagesInvalidTagOption: --tag must be followed by one or more (comma separated) tag IDs (numbers) and/or quoted tag slugs (ex.: "slug-1", "slug-2").
console.regenerateImagesStartAllWithout: ➡ Starting to process [{count}] discussions without images...
